title: andropogon virginicus f. hirsutior
intro: Andropogon virginicus f. hirsutior, also known as broom sedge, is a type of grass native to eastern North America. The medicinal properties of broom sedge include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of broom sedge include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and ease respiratory problems. Broom sedge can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
